projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Audit, generate, and distribute GEO & SEO content per site. Each project tracks its own findings, materials, generations, and publish history.

create.label: New project
create.hint: Give it a name and the root URL to audit.

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.hint: Create your first project to start auditing a site. Each project owns its audits, materials, generations, and distribution channels.

quickLinks.materialsHint: Sources the generator uses for context (URLs, files, notes)
quickLinks.generateHint: Compose a new generation from a template + materials
quickLinks.channelsHint: Where approved generations are published (WordPress, HTTP, agent)

pagesEmpty.title: No pages yet
pagesEmpty.hint: Run an audit to discover this site's pages.

runner.title: Run audit
runner.subtitle: Launch the audit pipeline (Fastify API + BullMQ worker + Postgres + pgvector) on this project. Results appear on the report page once the worker finishes.
runner.readyHint: The audit crawls the root URL, then runs 26 plugins across SEO, performance/CWV, GEO/AI-readiness, accessibility, and content. Typical runtime: 5–15s.

executive.gscEmpty: Connect Google Search Console to see search performance data.

noFindings.title: No findings
noFindings.hint: The audit ran clean — nothing to fix here.

materials.title: Materials
materials.subtitle: Sources the generator uses for context. They get embedded on the fly and retrieved by similarity when composing a new generation.

note.label: Note
note.hint: Inline text the generator uses as a source

fields.title: Title
fields.notePlaceholder: Apples are red and crisp. The scientific name is Malus domestica.

empty.title: No materials yet
empty.hint: Add at least one source above before composing a generation. The generator retrieves the most semantically similar ones per prompt.

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Versioned prompt + output schema pairs. Activate one to use as the default for new generations.

empty.title: No templates yet
empty.hint: A template defines the system prompt and output schema the generator fills in. Activate one before running a generation.

editor.outputSchemaHint: The model must emit a JSON object matching this shape, embedded in the post's frontmatter.

composer.title: Compose generation
composer.subtitle: Pick a template + materials, write a prompt, choose the LLM. The worker retrieves the top-K most similar materials by embedding and feeds them to the model.
composer.promptPlaceholder: Write a short blog post about apples
composer.noMaterials: None selected — generator will rely on the prompt alone.

review.progressHint: Job status is {{status}}. The MiniMax model is composing a draft — this page auto-refreshes every 2s.

channels.title: Channels
channels.subtitle: Where approved generations get published. Each channel type has a different config schema (WordPress credentials, an HTTP endpoint, or just an output directory).

typeDescriptions.wordpress: Publishes as a WP post via the REST API (app-password auth)
typeDescriptions.http: POSTs the rendered markdown to any HTTPS endpoint
typeDescriptions.agent: Writes a ZIP bundle the user downloads and pushes by hand

empty.title: No channels configured
empty.hint: Channels are managed per-channel via the API. Use the WordPress / HTTP / Agent adapters to route approved generations to a destination.

editor.configHint: Encrypted at rest with JHEO_SECRET_KEY. The decrypted shape is documented per channel type.

publish.title: Publish

status.running: Worker is publishing to the channel.
status.failed: All retries exhausted. Inspect lastError and retry.

publish.auditTrailHint: Every status transition writes one immutable event row. {{count}} event(s).

bundle.title: Agent bundle
bundle.subtitle: Files written by the agent publisher. Download the bundle and apply it manually (e.g. via CMS upload or git PR).

noFiles.title: No files yet
noFiles.hint: The publisher hasn't written anything. The publish must be completed first.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: API keys are encrypted at rest with JHEO_SECRET_KEY (AES-256-GCM). Values are write-only — the API never returns the plaintext over the wire.

openai_api_key.label: OpenAI API key
openai_api_key.hint: Used for embeddings + as default completion provider

openai_embedding_api_key.label: OpenAI embedding key
openai_embedding_api_key.hint: Separate slot when completion routes through an OpenAI-compatible third party (e.g. MiniMax)

empty.title: No keys stored yet
empty.hint: Add one below. The API will use env-var fallbacks if a key is missing, but encrypted Settings rows take precedence and survive across container restarts.

gsc.title: Google Search Console
gsc.emptyHint: Connect a GSC property with a Service Account JSON key. JHEO stores encrypted credentials and syncs search analytics daily.

errors.invalidJson: Service Account JSON is not valid JSON

help.audit: An audit checks a page for issues that affect how it ranks in search and how AI assistants read it.
help.finding: A finding is a specific issue found during an audit.
help.cwv: Core Web Vitals — Google's measure of how fast and stable a page feels.
help.geo: Generative Engine Optimization — making content easy for AI assistants to quote and cite.
help.seo: Search Engine Optimization — making the page rank higher in Google.
help.score: A number from 0 to 100 that summarizes how healthy the page is.
help.plugin: A small check the audit runs against the page (for example, a meta-description check).
help.crawl: Following the links on a page to discover more pages of the site.
help.sitemap: A file the site owner publishes to list every page they want indexed.
help.generation: A draft article written by the LLM, grounded in your audit findings.
help.publish: Sending an approved generation to a channel (WordPress, an HTTP endpoint, or an agent bundle).

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.no_llm_provider: Configure an LLM provider in Settings to enable translation.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.network: No connection to the server. Check your network and try again.
errors.server: The server returned an error ({{status}}). Please try again.
errors.backend_down: The server is unavailable. Please try again shortly.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Completed audit reports across your projects. Open any report to review scores and findings.

empty.title: No completed reports yet
empty.hint: Run an audit and wait for it to finish. Completed audits appear here.

fixes.title: Fixes
fixes.empty: No pending findings. Run an audit to get started.

error.findingNotPageScoped: This finding is not tied to a page; F7 cannot suggest a patch.
error.pageHtmlMissing: The page has no HTML snapshot. Re-audit the page first.
error.llmInvalid: The LLM returned an invalid response. Try regenerating.
error.rateLimited: Too many requests. Wait a minute and try again.

chooseProject.title: Pick a project
chooseProject.hint: Fixes are scoped to a project. Open the one you want to review.
chooseProject.noAudits: No audits yet — run one first.
chooseProject.noProjects: You don't have any projects yet.
